languages.text: "Знаете, иногда краем глаза я вижу странный мираж, который ехидно комментирует мои действия".
"You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."
languages.original_text: "Знаете, иногда краем глаза я вижу странный мираж, который ехидно комментирует мои действия".

traits.locale_text: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."
"You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."
"You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."

languages.text: «¿Sabe? En ocasiones me parece ver por el rabillo del ojo a un peculiar individuo que realiza comentarios sardónicos sobre mis actos».
languages.original_text: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."

traits.locale_text: «¿Sabe? En ocasiones me parece ver por el rabillo del ojo a un peculiar individuo que realiza comentarios sardónicos sobre mis actos».

languages.text: “你知道吗，有时候我的眼角会瞥到一个奇怪的幻影，它总对我的行为冷嘲热讽。”
languages.original_text: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."

traits.locale_text: “你知道吗，有时候我的眼角会瞥到一个奇怪的幻影，它总对我的行为冷嘲热讽。”

languages.text: « Vous savez, je vois parfois du coin de l'œil un étrange mirage qui commente toutes mes actions d'un ton acerbe. »
languages.original_text: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."

traits.locale_text: « Vous savez, je vois parfois du coin de l'œil un étrange mirage qui commente toutes mes actions d'un ton acerbe. »

languages.text: "Biliyor musun... Bazen göz ucuyla hareketlerim hakkında acımasızca yorum yapan tuhaf bir serap görüyorum."
languages.original_text: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."

traits.locale_text: "Biliyor musun... Bazen göz ucuyla hareketlerim hakkında acımasızca yorum yapan tuhaf bir serap görüyorum."

languages.text: 「知っているか、時々、視界の隅に、自分の行動を辛辣に批評する奇妙な幻影が見えるんだ」
languages.original_text: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."

traits.locale_text: 「知っているか、時々、視界の隅に、自分の行動を辛辣に批評する奇妙な幻影が見えるんだ」

languages.text: "Wisst Ihr, ab und an sehe ich aus den Augenwinkeln ein seltsames Trugbild, das jede meiner Aktionen kommentiert."
languages.original_text: "You know, sometimes out of the corner of my eye I see a strange mirage that comments acerbically on my actions."

traits.locale_text: "Wisst Ihr, ab und an sehe ich aus den Augenwinkeln ein seltsames Trugbild, das jede meiner Aktionen kommentiert."
